CustomObject.description: The Auris Form Mapping metadata is designed to make Auris → Salesforce Lead integration dynamic and configurable without changing code. Each metadata record represents one mapping rule between a JSON field and a Lead field. When a JSON payload is received from Auris, the system looks up the mapping based on: Department__c (UG, Masters, PhD, Exec. Ed.) TypeOfForm__c (Admission or Registration) JSON_Key__c (the key in incoming JSON) The mapped Lead field is then populated with the value from the Auris JSON. Datatype__c ensures proper data conversion (e.g., Date parsing, Number conversion). LeadSourceGroup__c allows grouping of mappings by source (currently "Auris").
CustomObject.label: Auris Form Mapping
